name: Toll House Pie II
recipeIngredient: 1 Pastry for a 9-inch one crust pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees.
2. Prepare the pastry.
3. In a large bowl, beat eggs until foamy.
4. Add flour, sugars; beat until well blended.
5. Blend in butter.
6. Stir in semi-sweet chocolate morsels and walnuts.
7. Pour into pastry-lined pie plate.
8. Bake until set, about 1 hour.
9. Serve warm with whipped cream or ice cream, if desired.
